misc: Primary organizer of the Hector Trophée event.
biography: A true veteran of the Hector Trophée, Toni arrives at the 2026 edition not only as its principal organizer but also as one of its most decorated competitors from Hirsala Golf. His profound influence on the tournament's very existence is mirrored only by his exceptional performance within its competitive arena, making him a central figure in the event's storied history.

Toni's competitive record stands as a testament to his consistent excellence. He has hoisted the coveted Hector Trophée with his paired partner on three separate occasions, showcasing his formidable prowess in the team format. Beyond the pair competition, he has also distinguished himself individually, securing the esteemed Victor Trophy on two occasions, an achievement that underscores his personal skill and determination.

Having participated in every single iteration since its inception, the forthcoming Hector Trophée 2026 will mark Toni's remarkable thirteenth appearance in this esteemed competition. As he continues to actively pursue further accolades, Toni embodies the very spirit of the Hector Trophée: a unique blend of passionate leadership, enduring dedication, and an unwavering competitive drive.
